name: Shopify store owners processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed renewals cause cash flow gaps. We notify finance ops of upcoming renewals instead of manual tracking of subscriptions in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Managing recurring subscription expenses and renewals

locked_fields.primary_problem: Managing recurring subscription expenses and renewals

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of subscriptions in spreadsheets
